name: Behavior Mediator
description: Canonical trace-aware JSONL behavior stream for OpenClaw.

runsDirectory.description: Absolute path to the root directory that stores one trace run per task.

artifactsEnabled.description: Whether to persist full redacted tool input/output sidecars under each run directory.

autoDiagnosisEnabled.description: Whether to trigger the CodeTracer diagnosis runner automatically after a run reaches a terminal state.

diagnosisScript.description: Absolute path to the Python script that builds the CodeTracer bundle and runs diagnosis for one run directory.

diagnosisPython.description: Python executable used to spawn the diagnosis runner.

outputFile.description: Deprecated legacy hot-log path. If provided, runsDirectory defaults to <outputFile parent>/runs.

capturePreviewChars.description: Maximum characters stored in redacted preview fields.

captureNetwork.description: Whether to capture non-LLM fetch evidence as network spans.

traceEval.description: Whether to trace eval and Function constructor activity.

redactHeaders.description: Case-insensitive HTTP header names that should always be redacted.

redactPatterns.description: Regular expression patterns used to redact secrets from previews.
